category_sources: source_facts.description says fits files/folders to fixed size volumes; official GAFFitter website says it arranges files/directories into target-capacity volumes using a genetic algorithm.
display_name_sources: Official website uses "Genetic Algorithm File Fitter" and "GAFFitter"; source_facts.name is gaffitter.
docs_sources: Official GAFFitter website includes Usage, Examples, scripts, filter usage, license, and a Documentation link to Class Hierarchy.
repo_sources: Official GAFFitter website links "Git Repository" to SourceForge; SourceForge project provides a Source section for the project.
tags_sources: Official website describes command-line file/directory volume fitting, genetic algorithm search, pipe/filter integration, and GPL C++ software; SourceForge categories include Genetic Algorithms, File Managers, and Archiving.
